# Agent Instructions

See [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) for the authoritative source on:

- Build, test, and lint commands (`pnpm build`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm lint`)
- Project architecture and key patterns (service-oriented, entity model, async iterators, builder pattern, io-ts validation)
- Directory structure (`src/substack-client.ts`, `src/internal/`, `src/domain/`, `tests/`)
- Commit and PR guidelines (Conventional Commits)
- Testing strategy (unit, integration, e2e)
